groups.text: It is currently 21 degrees and partly cloudy in Berlin-Tempelhof.
With the morning weather set, here is the news.

NVIDIA is pushing the boundaries of how AI agents operate and where they are built. The company recently introduced Nemotron 3 Ultra to enable faster reasoning for long running agents that must maintain context across complex workflows. This technical shift comes as CEO Jensen Huang visits Seoul to engage with South Korea's robotics innovators and sovereign AI infrastructure.

Infrastructure needs extend beyond computing to energy production. China has nearly doubled its nuclear power capacity since 2016, with generation capacity increasing by 76 percent between 2016 and 2024.

While energy and tech scale, cultural and systemic pressures remain a point of global focus. France marks the centenary of Marilyn Monroe's birth, reflecting on her role as a global pop culture icon who fought against studio constraints. At the same time, analysts suggest that reading works like Orwell's 1984 or Kafka's The Trial provides a necessary lens for understanding modern employers.

In Germany, the fallout from a major security failure is reaching the courts. Ten plaintiffs are seeking over one million euros in damages following a spectacular break in at the Sparkasse Gelsenkirchen vault. The lawsuits, which begin this Thursday, center on the looting of 3,000 safety deposit boxes and whether the bank's security technology was obsolete.
After the headlines, back to the weather.
This afternoon will be cloudy with temperatures between 21 and 22 degrees.
And from the weather, a quick look at the calendar.

On your calendar today: personal calendar: all day: Department Retro, Fronleichnam at BY, BW, HE, NW, RP, SL, and Fronleichnam at HE, BW, BY, NW, RP, SL, at 10:00, Mandatory Security Awareness Training, at 13:00, NAS Brainstorm, at 17:00, Friday beer & Cocktails, and at 19:00, Höfische.
And that's it for your personal morning broadcast.
[mature adult voice, intensely emotional, tender, radiant; hold a long breath after Rise] Rise... and shine.
[very very long pause before speaking; then mature adult voice, most emotional, strong, warm, radiant, deeply encouraging; hold a long breath after Rise] Rise... and shine.
